tools.name: aks_list_addons
tools.description: List add-ons installed on an AKS cluster (name, version, enabled state). Queries the Azure API and returns structured JSON.

params.name: resource_group
params.description: Azure resource group containing the cluster

params.name: subscription
params.description: Azure subscription ID (defaults to active subscription)

tools.name: aks_find_terraform
tools.description: Extract AKS resource declarations and Kubernetes version from Terraform files. Returns cluster config and node pool definitions found under the given directory.

params.name: root_dir
params.description: Root directory to scan for .tf files

tools.name: aks_helm_list_releases
tools.description: List Helm releases deployed in the active kubeconfig context on AKS. Returns release name, namespace, chart, and installed version.

tools.name: aks_verify_environment
tools.description: Check that required CLIs (az, kubectl, helm) are installed and Azure credentials are active. Returns a pass/fail status for each prerequisite.

params.name: profile
params.description: Azure subscription to validate (defaults to active login)
